verdicts.description: Visually inspect all external screws for correct seating.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker checks every external screw is flush and correctly seated.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker systematically checks all external screws at 00:00:30.

verdicts.description: Confirm all cable ties are secured and no cables are pinched.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker inspects all cable routing and confirms cable ties are clipped and no pinch points exist.

verdicts.description: Power on the unit and confirm all indicator LEDs illuminate green.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker powers on unit and observes all LEDs showing green before proceeding.
verdicts.reasoning: Unit powered on at 00:02:00. All indicator LEDs confirmed green.

verdicts.description: Run functional test cycle for 60 seconds.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker initiates functional test and allows it to complete the full 60-second cycle.
verdicts.reasoning: Functional test started at 00:02:30 and completed at 00:03:31. Duration met.

verdicts.description: Power off the unit and confirm all LEDs extinguish.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker powers off unit and confirms all LEDs are off before proceeding.
verdicts.reasoning: Unit powered off correctly at 00:03:45. All LEDs confirmed off.

verdicts.description: Apply protective foam padding to all four corners of the unit.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker applies foam padding to all four corners of the unit before packaging.
verdicts.reasoning: Foam padding applied to all four corners at 00:04:30.

verdicts.description: Place the unit into the packaging box with the label side facing up.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker places unit into box with label side visibly facing upward.
verdicts.reasoning: Unit placed into packaging correctly at 00:05:45.

verdicts.description: Photograph the completed assembly from three angles and attach to the production record.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker takes three photographs from specified angles before signing off.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker signs off and moves the unit to the dispatch area at 00:07:30 without taking any photographs. No camera or phone usage visible in the final segment.
